name: Average Settlements for Knee Ladder Injuries

mainEntity.name: What's average settlement for ladder fall knee injury in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: What's average settlement for ladder fall knee injury in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah averages $50K-$150K for knee ladder falls: $20K medical, $30K TTD, $50K PPD 10-20% LEI. Varies by age/wage.

suggestedAnswer.text: Younger workers in Cottonwood Heights get higher PPD multipliers. Factor lost overtime. 2026 data shows 35% increase from inflation. Get multiple evals—insurers lowball.

description: Utah averages $50K-$150K for knee ladder falls: $20K medical, $30K TTD, $50K PPD 10-20% LEI. Varies by age/wage.
